text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of Tracen Academy's
annual summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I used to attend a beachside summer camp with
the other students at my family's dojo, so being
here feels vaguely nostalgic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and Sakura Chiyono O, who are
both recovering from injuries, make their way
over to greet Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O! Ardan! You're here for summer
camp?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, we figured it'd do us better to come
and get some fresh air than to stay cooped up in
the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I mean, I might be injured, but I can still train!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Racing, though... That's off the menu for the time
being.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: When are you hoping to make your return?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I expect it will be difficult for either of us to
resume racing before the end of the year...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I ran the Derby with everything I had, fully
prepared for both my legs to shatter. I've no
regrets at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But there is one thing I find rather vexing... I
really would have liked to have taken a shot at
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's frustrating that I can't compete, but I'll just
cheer for you instead, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Do your very best in the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll make you both proud, I promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Learning how her rivals feel about being unable
to compete only bolsters Yaeno Muteki's
determination. This is going to be a heated
summer camp for sure.
